description: Whether agents can be restricted to specific tools via allowlists, denylists, tool categories, or per-tool configuration maps.

claude-code.mechanism: tools allowlist and disallowedTools denylist in frontmatter; Agent(type) syntax restricts which subagent types a main-thread agent can spawn

codex.mechanism: role config layers override model/settings but no explicit tool allowlist or denylist in role definitions

copilot-cli.mechanism: tools field with cross-provider alias system (execute/shell/Bash, read/Read, edit/Edit, etc.); ["*"] grants all tools; unrecognized names silently ignored

cursor.mechanism: readonly frontmatter flag restricts an agent to read-only tools; fine-grained per-tool allow/deny lists are not documented.

factory-droid.mechanism: categorical tool policy using named categories (filesystem, shell, search, browser, web_fetch); differs from per-tool allowlists used by other providers

kiro.mechanism: tools array with exact names, wildcards (computer_*), or MCP-namespaced refs (mcp:serverName:toolName); toolsSettings for per-tool config objects

opencode.mechanism: The permission frontmatter map configures ask/allow/deny per tool, replacing the deprecated tools allow/deny map.

roo-code.mechanism: groups array declares which tool groups (e.g., read, edit, browser, command, mcp) the mode may use; group entries may be strings or objects with fileRegex restrictions
